user.title: Grab Food Thailand
user.description:
Paste your Grab access token.

**Browser:** food.grab.com → F12 → Application → Local Storage → copy `access_token`.

**Android (HTTPCanary):** intercept any Grab request → copy the value after `Authorization: Bearer `.

The token starts with `eyJ`.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Grab servers. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_token: Token rejected. Copy the full value starting with eyJ with no extra spaces.

abort.already_configured: This Grab account is already configured.
